title: Pass 5.C.6: misc deferred-without-anchor stubs (llama HQQ, data ToTensor, profiler with_stack)
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — bundled minor STUBs.

- ferrotorch-llama src/quant_loaders.rs:18 — module doc declares HQQ 'deferred — see follow-up issue' without an actual issue link. No HQQ struct or fn exists. Honest deferral but unanchored.
- ferrotorch-data src/transforms.rs:187-201 — ToTensor self-described 'placeholder for a future image-to-tensor conversion' — pure identity. Listed in pub use exports and conformance fixtures as a real transform.
- ferrotorch-profiler src/profiler.rs:17 — with_stack doc says 'not yet implemented' but maybe_capture_stack at line 220 IS implemented. Stale doc OR stale stub marker.

Acceptance:
- llama HQQ: file or anchor a tracking issue, link it from the doc, OR delete the stub mention
- data ToTensor: implement real image-to-tensor (PIL-buffer / RGB normalize), OR remove from public exports
- profiler with_stack: align doc and impl (one of them is stale).
